title: carthamus matritensis
intro: Carthamus matritensis, also known as the Torrecilla safflower, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which are high in oil content and have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carthamus matritensis include its potential to reduce cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant's seeds and flowers are typically used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
